mapper.sql: id, version_name as versionName, run_name as runName, model_path as modelPath, label_map_path as labelMapPath, training_curve_path as trainingCurvePath, confusion_matrix_path as confusionMatrixPath, eval_result_path as evalResultPath, sample_count as sampleCount, train_sample_count as trainSampleCount, val_sample_count as valSampleCount, class_count as classCount, input_shape as inputShape, final_train_accuracy as finalTrainAccuracy, final_val_accuracy as finalValAccuracy, final_train_loss as finalTrainLoss, final_val_loss as finalValLoss, duration_sec as durationSec, label_map_json as labelMapJson, status, published, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt
mapper.select:
select
from sign_model_version order by id desc

select
from sign_model_version where id = #{id} limit 1

select
from sign_model_version where run_name = #{runName} limit 1

select
from sign_model_version where published = 1 order by id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sign_model_version ( version_name, run_name, model_path, label_map_path, training_curve_path, confusion_matrix_path, eval_result_path, sample_count, train_sample_count, val_sample_count, class_count, input_shape, final_train_accuracy, final_val_accuracy, final_train_loss, final_val_loss, duration_sec, label_map_json, status, published ) values ( #{versionName}, #{runName}, #{modelPath}, #{labelMapPath}, #{trainingCurvePath}, #{confusionMatrixPath}, #{evalResultPath}, #{sampleCount}, #{trainSampleCount}, #{valSampleCount}, #{classCount}, #{inputShape}, #{finalTrainAccuracy}, #{finalValAccuracy}, #{finalTrainLoss}, #{finalValLoss}, #{durationSec}, #{labelMapJson}, #{status}, #{published} )
mapper.update: update sign_model_version set published = 0, status = 'TRAINED' where published = 1
update sign_model_version set published = 1, status = 'PUBLISHED' where id = #{id}
